member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Models.MDictOptions
member.summary: MDict options for configuring the behavior of the MDict parser.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.MDictOptions.Passcode
member.summary: The passcode for decrypting the MDict file, if it is encrypted.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.MDictOptions.Debug
member.summary: Debug mode flag. If true, enables debug output.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.MDictOptions.Resort
member.summary: Indicates whether to resort the keyword list after loading.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.MDictOptions.IsStripKey
member.summary: Indicates whether to strip keys (remove special characters). This is useful for normalizing keys before searching. Default is true, meaning keys will be stripped.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.MDictOptions.IsCaseSensitive
member.summary: Indicates whether the keys are case-sensitive.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.MDictOptions.EncryptType
member.summary: The type of encryption used in the MDict file.

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Models.MDictHeader
member.summary: Represents the header of an MDict dictionary.

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyHeader
member.summary: Represents the key header of an MDict dictionary.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyHeader.KeywordBlocksNum
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of keyword blocks in the dictionary.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyHeader.KeywordNum
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of keywords in the dictionary.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyHeader.KeyInfoUnpackSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the unpacked size of the key info block.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyHeader.KeyInfoPackedSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the packed size of the key info block.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyHeader.KeywordBlockPackedSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the packed size of the keyword block.

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyInfoItem
member.summary: Represents an item in the key info list of the MDict dictionary.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyInfoItem.FirstKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the first key in the key block.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyInfoItem.LastKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the last key in the key block.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyInfoItem.KeyBlockPackSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the packed size of the key block.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyInfoItem.KeyBlockPackAccumulator
member.summary: Gets or sets the accumulated offset for the packed key block.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyInfoItem.KeyBlockUnpackSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the unpacked size of the key block.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyInfoItem.KeyBlockUnpackAccumulator
member.summary: Gets or sets the accumulated offset for the unpacked key block.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyInfoItem.KeyBlockEntriesNum
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of entries in the key block.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyInfoItem.KeyBlockEntriesNumAccumulator
member.summary: Gets or sets the accumulated number of entries in the key block.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyInfoItem.KeyBlockInfoIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets the index of the key block info in the key info list.

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyWordItem
member.summary: Represents a keyword item in the MDict dictionary.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyWordItem.RecordStartOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the start offset of the record for this keyword.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyWordItem.RecordEndOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the end offset of the record for this keyword.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyWordItem.KeyText
member.summary: Gets or sets the text of the keyword.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyWordItem.KeyBlockIdx
member.summary: Gets or sets the index of the key block that this keyword belongs to.

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Models.RecordHeader
member.summary: Represents the header information for a record in the MDict dictionary.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.RecordHeader.RecordBlocksNum
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of record blocks in the dictionary.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.RecordHeader.EntriesNum
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of entries in the dictionary.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.RecordHeader.RecordInfoCompSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the unpacked size of the record info block.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.RecordHeader.RecordBlockCompSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the packed size of the record info block.

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Models.RecordInfo
member.summary: Represents information about a record in the MDict dictionary.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.RecordInfo.PackSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the start offset of the record in the packed data.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.RecordInfo.PackAccumulateOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the accumulated offset for the packed record data.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.RecordInfo.UnpackSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the unpacked size of the record data.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.RecordInfo.UnpackAccumulatorOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the accumulated offset for the unpacked record data.

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdictMeta
member.summary: Represents metadata for an MDict dictionary file.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdictMeta.Fname
member.summary: The file name of the MDict dictionary.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdictMeta.Passcode
member.summary: The passcode used to decrypt the MDict file, if it is encrypted.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdictMeta.Ext
member.summary: The file extension of the MDict dictionary, default is "mdx".

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdictMeta.Version
member.summary: The version of the MDict engine that generated this dictionary file.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdictMeta.NumWidth
member.summary: The width of the number used in the dictionary, either 4 or 8 bytes.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdictMeta.NumFmt
member.summary: The number format used in the dictionary, either UInt32 or UInt64.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdictMeta.Encoding
member.summary: The encoding used in the MDict dictionary, such as "UTF-8", "UTF-16", "BIG5", or "GB18030".

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdictMeta.Decoder
member.summary: The text decoder used to decode byte arrays into strings based on the encoding.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdictMeta.Encrypt
member.summary: The encryption type used in the MDict file.

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Models.BaseDict
member.summary: Base class for MDict file model.

member.name: F:MDict.Csharp.Models.BaseDict.FileName
member.summary: File path of this dictionary file.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.BaseDict.#ctor(System.String,System.String,MDict.Csharp.Models.MDictOptions)
member.summary: BaseMDict constructor

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.BaseDict.SplitKeyBlock(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
M:MDict.Csharp.Models.BaseDict.ReadHeader
member.summary: STEP 1. read dictionary header Get mdx header info (xml content to object) [0:4], 4 bytes header length (header_byte_size), big-endian, 4 bytes, 16 bits [4:header_byte_size + 4] header_bytes [header_bytes_size + 4:header_bytes_size +8] adler32 checksum should be: zlib.adler32(header_bytes) & 0xffffffff == adler32

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.BaseDict.ReadKeyHeader
member.summary: STEP 2. read key block header read key block header

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.BaseDict.ReadKeyInfos
member.summary: STEP 3. read key block info, if you want quick search, read at here already enough read key block info key block info list

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.BaseDict.DecodeKeyInfo(System.Byte[])
M:MDict.Csharp.Models.BaseDict.UnpackKeyBlock(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: step 4.1. decode key block find the key block by the phrase

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.BaseDict.ReadKeyBlocks
member.summary: STEP 4. decode key block decode key block return the total keys list, Note: this method runs very slow, please do not use this unless special target

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.BaseDict.ReadRecordHeader
member.summary: STEP 5. decode record header, includes: [0:8 / 4] - record block number [8:16 / 4:8] - num entries the key-value entries number [16:24 / 8:12] - record block info size [24:32 / 12:16] - record block size

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.BaseDict.ReadRecordBlocks
member.summary: STEP 7. read all records block, this is a slow method, do not use!

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Models.TextDecoder
member.summary: A class for decoding byte arrays into strings using various encodings.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.TextDecoder.#ctor
member.summary: Default constructor that initializes the decoder to use UTF-8 encoding.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.TextDecoder.#ctor(MDict.Csharp.Models.TextDecoder.DecoderType)
member.summary: Constructor that initializes the decoder with a specific encoding type.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.TextDecoder.Decode(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decodes a byte array into a string using the specified encoding type.

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Models.TextDecoder.DecoderType
member.summary: Enumeration of supported decoder types.

member.name: F:MDict.Csharp.Models.TextDecoder.DecoderType.UTF16LE
member.summary: Decodes using UTF-16 Little Endian encoding.

member.name: F:MDict.Csharp.Models.TextDecoder.DecoderType.UTF8
member.summary: Decodes using UTF-8 encoding.

member.name: F:MDict.Csharp.Models.TextDecoder.DecoderType.Big5
member.summary: Decodes using Big5 encoding.

member.name: F:MDict.Csharp.Models.TextDecoder.DecoderType.GB18030
member.summary: Decodes using GB18030 encoding.

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Models.Dict
member.summary: MDict file model for MDict.
member.remarks: After a series of tests, it was found that mdx format files have significant issues with word sorting. 1. Case sensitivity issues, such as the coexistence of a-zA-Z and aA-zZ. 2. Multilingual issues, where English and Chinese characters are compared, generally English should precede Chinese. 3. Minor language issues. These issues can occur, and cannot be resolved through the settings in the dictionary header. Therefore, it is not possible to quickly index using the internal keyInfoList. Under modern computer performance conditions, directly traversing all entries can yield good results. So the current strategy is to read all entries and sort them internally.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.Dict.#ctor(System.String,MDict.Csharp.Models.MDictOptions)
member.summary: Constructor for MDict.

members.member: lookupKeyInfoItem lookup the `keyInfoItem` the `keyInfoItem` contains key-word record block location: recordStartOffset the `recordStartOffset` should indicate the unpacked record data relative offset @param word the target word phrase
find record which record start locate @param {number} recordStart record start offset

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.Dict.Close
member.summary: Close the MDict instance and release resources.

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Models.FileScanner
M:MDict.Csharp.Models.FileScanner.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Constructor to initialize the FileScanner with a file path.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.FileScanner.Close
member.summary: Close the file stream if it is open.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.FileScanner.ReadBuffer(System.Int64,System.Int32)
member.summary: Read a buffer from a specific file offset with specified length

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.FileScanner.ReadNumber(System.Int64,System.Int32)
member.summary: Read a binary number from a specific file offset

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.FileScanner.Dispose
member.summary: Dispose method to close the file stream when done.

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Models.MddDict
member.summary: MDict Mdd file model.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.MddDict.#ctor(System.String,MDict.Csharp.Models.MDictOptions)
member.summary: Create a new instance with the specified file name and options.

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Models.MddDict.LocateResult
member.summary: Result of locating a resource key in the Mdd file.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.MddDict.LocateResult.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Result of locating a resource key in the Mdd file.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.MddDict.Locate(System.String)
member.summary: Locate the resource key
member.param: Resource key
member.returns: The key text and base64-encoded definition

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdxDict
member.summary: MDX file model for MDict.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdxDict.#ctor(System.String,MDict.Csharp.Models.MDictOptions)
member.summary: Create a new instance with the specified file name and options.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdxDict.Lookup(System.String)
member.summary: Lookup the definition of a word.
member.param: The word to look up. It should be a full word.
member.returns: A tuple containing the key text and its definition.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdxDict.Fetch(MDict.Csharp.Models.KeyWordItem)
member.summary: Fetch the definition of a keyword item.
member.param: The keyword item to fetch the definition for.
member.returns: A tuple containing the key text and its definition.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdxDict.Prefix(System.String)
member.summary: Fetch the definition of a keyword item by its prefix.
member.param: The prefix to search for. It should be a word prefix.
member.returns: A list of keyword items that start with the given prefix.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdxDict.Associate(System.String)
member.summary: Associate a phrase with its keyword items.
member.param: The phrase to associate with keyword items. It should be a full word or phrase.
member.returns: A list of keyword items associated with the given phrase.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdxDict.Suggest(System.String,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Suggest keyword items based on a phrase and an edit distance.
member.param: The phrase to associate with keyword items. It should be a full word or phrase.
The maximum edit distance allowed for suggestions, like 3 or 5.
member.returns: A list of keyword items that are suggested based on the given phrase and edit distance.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdxDict.FuzzySearch(System.String,System.Int32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Perform a fuzzy search for words based on a given word, fuzzy size, and edit distance gap.
member.param: The word to search for. It should be a full word or phrase.
The maximum number of fuzzy words to return. It should be a positive integer.
The maximum edit distance allowed for fuzzy search, like 3 or 5.
member.returns: A list of fuzzy words that match the given word within the specified edit distance.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Models.MdxDict.EnumerateKeys
member.summary: Enumerates all dictionary keys in normalized sort order.

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Models.FuzzyWord
member.summary: Represents a fuzzy word with its edit distance.

member.name: P:MDict.Csharp.Models.FuzzyWord.Ed
member.summary: The edit distance of the fuzzy word from the original word.

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Utils.LatinUtils
member.summary:
Example usage: string input = "café";
bool has = LatinHelper.HasLatinies(input); // true string replaced = LatinHelper.ReplaceLatinies(input); // "cafe\u9999"

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.LatinUtils.ReplaceLatinies(System.String)
member.summary: Replace Latin combining diacritical marks with '\u9999'
member.param: The input string to process
member.returns: A string with Latin diacritics replaced by '\u9999'

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.LatinUtils.HasLatinies(System.String)
member.summary: Check if a word contains Latin combining diacritical marks
member.param: The input string to check
member.returns: True if it contains Latin diacritics, otherwise false

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.LatinUtils.LatinDiacriticRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[\\u0300-\\u036f]
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [\u0300-\u036F].

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Utils.MeasureUtils
M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.MeasureUtils.MeasureTimeFn``1(System.Func{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Measure the time cost of a function call (generic version with return value).
member.param: The callee function
Function name (optional)
member.returns: A wrapped function that logs the time taken

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.MeasureUtils.MeasureTimeFn(System.Action,System.String)
member.summary: Measure the time cost of a function call (void version).
member.param: The callee action
Function name (optional)
member.returns: A wrapped action that logs the time taken

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.MeasureUtils.Measure(System.String)
member.summary: Measure memory usage at the current step and print the memory usage including differences from the previous measurement.
member.param: The label or category name for this measurement step

member.name: T:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Ripemd128
M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Ripemd128.Rotl(System.UInt32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Swap high and low bits of a 32-bit int.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Ripemd128.Concat(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Concat 2 typed array.

member.name: F:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Utils.REGEXP_STRIPKEY
member.summary: 模式映射，用于剥离特定关键字中的字符

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Utils.NewByteArray(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 从给定的 Buffer 创建一个新的 byte[]。

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Utils.ReadUTF16(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 从 Buffer 中读取 UTF-16 编码的字符串。

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Utils.GetExtension(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 获取文件名的扩展名。

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Utils.TripleMin(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 返回三个数字中的最小值。

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Utils.LevenshteinDistance(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 计算两个字符串之间的 Levenshtein 距离。

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Utils.ParseHeader(System.String)
member.summary: 解析 XML 格式的头部文本，提取属性。

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Utils.FastDecrypt(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: 使用简单的加密算法快速解密数据。

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Utils.SalsaDecrypt(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decrypt data using Salsa20/8 (8 rounds) with an 8-byte zero IV. Used for type-2 encrypted MDX key block headers.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Utils.DecryptRegcodeByEmail(System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: Derive the encryption key from a registration code and email address (RegisterBy=EMail). Key derivation: emailDigest = RIPEMD128(email UTF-16LE), then Salsa20/8(regcode, emailDigest).

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Utils.DecryptRegcodeByDeviceId(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Derive the encryption key from a registration code and device ID (RegisterBy=DeviceID). Key derivation: deviceIdDigest = RIPEMD128(deviceId), then Salsa20/8(regcode, deviceIdDigest).

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Utils.MdxDecrypt(System.Byte[])
member.summary: 解密 MDX 格式的压缩块。

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Utils.AppendBuffer(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: 将两个 ArrayBuffer 连接成一个新的 Buffer。

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Utils.IsTrue(System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether the given string represents a true value.
member.param: The string to check.
member.returns: True if the string represents a true value; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Utils.WordCompare(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Compares two words in a case-insensitive manner with additional logic.
member.param: First word.
Second word.
member.returns: 0 if equal, -1 if word1 is less, 1 if word1 is greater.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Utils.UnescapeEntities(System.String)
member.summary: Unescapes HTML entities in the given text.
member.param: The input string containing entities.

member.name: M:MDict.Csharp.Utils.Utils.SubstituteStylesheet(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String[]},System.String)
member.summary: Applies styles from a style sheet to marked text fragments.
member.param: Dictionary mapping style indices to style wrappers.
Text containing style markers in the form of `number`.

member.summary: Custom -derived type for the LatinDiacriticRegex method.

member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.LatinDiacriticRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.
